mapper.select: SELECT fi.region, COUNT(pp.id) AS batchCount, 0.0 AS totalKg FROM peanut_product pp LEFT JOIN farmer_info fi ON pp.farmer_id = fi.farmer_id WHERE pp.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY fi.region ORDER BY batchCount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pp.create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(pp.id) AS batchCount, ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN pp.inspect_result = '合格' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(pp.id), 1 ) AS passRate FROM peanut_product pp WHERE pp.is_deleted = 0 AND YEAR(pp.create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(pp.create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
